description: Literary text in Coptic. Probably biblical, but identification is not straightforward. ⲙⲏⲏϣⲉ ⲧⲏⲣⲟⲩ  '(the) whole crowd'; ⲙⲛ ⲡⲛⲟⲩⲧⲉ 'and/with God'; ⲁϥⲥⲁϫⲓ ⲛϭⲓ ⲇⲁⲩⲉⲓⲇ 'David said'; ⲛⲉⲕϣⲡⲏⲣⲉ 'thy wonders'; ⲙⲙⲟⲥ ϫⲉ '[said] to her that'; ⲛⲁⲗⲱⲟⲩⲉ 'grape-bunches'; ⲙⲙⲟⲥ. ϫⲉⲁϥⲉⲓ [?] ⲉⲓ͞ⲗⲏ͞ⲙ '[told] her that he had come [..] to Jerusalem'; [ⲁ]ⲗⲏⲩ ϩⲓϫⲛ ⲟⲩ[? 'having climbed onto a...'; ⲁⲩϫⲓ ⲛ-ⲛⲉⲛ-ⲃ 'they took our ⲃ...s.' Information kindly provided by Matthew Boutilier, Matthew Scarborough, and Doug Henning.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בקופטית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
